name: Corrosive Crystal

prerequisites.other: acid fog, acid storm, Melf's acid arrow, or storm of vengeance

description: The surface of this weapon looks dark and pitted, and the blade, point, or head appears fragile, as if the first blow might break it. When activated, a corrosive weapon is sheathed in acid. The acid does not harm you as long as you have the weapon in hand. The effect persists until you speak a second command word. A weapon that has this property deals an extra 1d6 points of acid damage on a successful hit. Projectile weapons bestow this property upon their ammunition.
unidentifiedDesc: A dark, pitted weapon augmentation crystal.
